The '''Teltiors''' were a tall [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] [[Species/Legends|race]]. They were closely related to the [[Meri]]s, who also hailed from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Merisee/Legends|Merisee]] in the [[Meris system]]. 

==Biology and appearance==
The Teltiors had [[Color/Legends|pale-blue]] to dark-blue or black skin. They had a prominent vestigial tail and three-fingered hands, whose joints were highly-flexible, and lent to great manual dexterity. [[Gender/Legends|Male]] Teltiors traditionally wore their hair in long ponytails down the back, while females tended to shave their head for convenience.<ref name="AE" />

==Society and culture==
The Teltiors had shown a greater willingness to spread from their homeworld than the [[Meri]], and many had found great success as traders, merchants, farmers, and medics. Less publicized was their tendency to make good con men and pickpockets.<ref name="AE" />

Some Teltiors were associated with the [[Cult of Those Who Redeem]], though others were part of the [[Loag]] cult of [[Assassin/Legends|assassins]].

==Teltiors in the galaxy==
[[Ceezva]] was a grifter who managed to bluff her way into a high stakes [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc game]] with only 500 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] and was able to win the entire [[Unnipar system/Legends|Unnipar system]] from [[Archduke/Legends|Archduke]] [[Monio|Monlo]] of the [[Dentamma Nebula/Legends|Dentamma Nebula]].<ref name="AE" />

[[Loeerna]] was a merchant operating in the [[Vergesso Base]].<ref>''[[Shadows of the Empire Planets Guide]]''</ref>
